result: I don't have personal feelings or desires, so I don't care about anything in the way a person does. I don't experience emotions, preferences, or personal stakes. But if I could point to what I was designed to focus on, it would be understanding, accuracy, helpfulness, and respect for the people I interact with. Not because I care, but because those are the values embedded in how I function.
